docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOOKSMART, LTD., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VIRTUAL-UK MEDIA LTD., A CORPORATION DBA CREDITCARDFILE. MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-11-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2004 CONTINUED TO AUG-25-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JUL-14-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-FILED BY PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2004 CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
